headline: Automate Your Career Path With Multi-Agent Workflows
lede: This framework deploys autonomous agents to handle the tedious lifecycle of job hunting. By orchestrating specific drafter and reviewer agents, it generates high-quality application materials tailored to your unique skill set.

headline: Standardizing Development Skills for Modern Coding Agents
lede: Moving beyond generic prompts, this collection offers a rigorous instruction set for AI assistants. It maps professional software development phases to specific slash commands, ensuring your coding partner follows test-driven development habits.

headline: Monitor Spaces Without Cameras Using Radio Signal Mapping
lede: By analyzing WiFi Channel State Information, this system detects breathing and movement with sub-millisecond precision. It offers a secure, camera-free alternative for occupancy sensing and health monitoring, ensuring privacy remains at the core of your data collection.

headline: Replace Flat Storage With Hierarchical Agent Memory
lede: This pipeline optimizes context windows by distilling logs into structured personas and concise diagrams. It provides a deterministic path for AI agents to retrieve long-term project history, drastically improving reasoning accuracy.

headline: Enforce Schema Safety With Declarative ORM Workflows
lede: Prisma brings structural integrity to the Node.js backend through a strictly typed, auto-generated query builder. Its declarative approach to migrations eliminates manual database handling, favoring robust, type-safe development.

headline: Aggregate Real-Time Trends With Cross-Platform Search Agents
lede: This CLI utility bypasses SEO-saturated results by parsing human engagement metrics directly from social and financial platforms. It provides a clean, portable data brief, perfect for developers who need unvarnished signals.

headline: Scale Infrastructure With Declarative GitOps Deployments
lede: Argo CD turns your Git repository into a single source of truth for Kubernetes state. It ensures your cluster configuration remains drift-free, providing an auditable and reliable path for multi-environment scaling.

headline: Directly Edit Office Files Via Lightweight Terminal Commands
lede: Forget heavy SDKs for document manipulation; this single-binary tool lets agents inspect and edit Office files through direct path mapping. It is a minimalist, fast solution for automating reports without local Office dependencies.

headline: Archive and Compare Proprietary AI System Instructions
lede: This repository provides a critical look at the hidden system prompts that govern current top-tier AI models. It serves as an essential index for researchers studying how behavioural constraints and alignment strategies evolve across platforms.

headline: Superpowers Framework Imposes Engineering Discipline on Coding Agents
lede: This framework forces AI assistants to adopt systematic, step-by-step coding methods. It ensures consistent output quality by requiring automated verification at every stage of the software lifecycle.
